title: cyperus alatus subsp. albus
intro: Cyperus alatus subsp. albus, also known as the White-veined Umbrella Sedge, is a subspecies of plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cyperus alatus subsp. albus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
